catalogMetaDescription: Published categories and products delivered from Darwin.WebApi.
productFallbackMetaDescription: Storefront product detail delivered from Darwin.WebApi.
heroTitle: Storefront catalog now reads from Darwin.WebApi
heroDescription: Categories and product cards are now driven by the public catalog contracts. This keeps storefront work aligned with real CMS/catalog data instead of placeholder-only pages.
currentResultsNote: published products in this server query
visibleOffersNote: cards with compare-at pricing on this page
degradedTitle: Storefront data is running in degraded mode.
degradedMessage: Categories: {categoriesStatus}. Products: {productsStatus}. The page stays available, but public API connectivity or payload quality needs attention.
resultSummaryMessage: Showing published products {pageStart} to {pageEnd} of {totalProducts}. You are on catalog page {currentPage} of {totalPages}.
resultSummaryFilteredMessage: Showing {visibleCount} visible products out of {loadedCount} loaded on catalog page {currentPage}, with {totalProducts} published products available overall.
catalogRouteSummaryMessage: Category status: {categoriesStatus}. Product status: {productsStatus}. CMS status: {cmsPagesStatus}. {visibleCount} products are visible on page {currentPage} of {totalPages}, with {totalProducts} published products available overall.
catalogCompositionJourneyMessage: Catalog should also act like a route-level journey that keeps the active browse window, the next review move, and storefront continuation visible instead of behaving like a bare listing surface.
catalogCompositionJourneyCurrentTitle: Keep the active browse window visible
catalogCompositionJourneyCurrentDescript: {count} visible products are currently in scope on page {page}, so this route should keep the current browse window explicit before the shopper drills into review or detail.
catalogCompositionJourneyNextTitle: Move into the strongest current review window
catalogCompositionJourneyNextDescription: This browse surface already knows the strongest next review set, so the shopper or operator should be able to continue without rebuilding the review lens manually.
catalogCompositionJourneyStorefrontDescr: The strongest visible storefront opportunity is currently available for {price}.
catalogCompositionJourneyStorefrontFallb: A live browse path remains available when the shopper wants to continue through the current assortment instead of leaving the route.
catalogCompositionRouteMapMessage: Catalog should hand off cleanly into review, content, and cart/account continuity instead of acting like a standalone product grid.
catalogCompositionRouteMapCurrentTitle: Keep the full browse window open
catalogCompositionRouteMapCurrentDescrip: {count} visible products are currently in this window on page {page}.
catalogCompositionRouteMapReviewTitle: Open the strongest next review window
catalogCompositionRouteMapReviewDescript: The current browse surface can already hand off into the strongest review set without resetting search, category, or browse lenses.
catalogCompositionRouteMapReviewMeta: {count} visible products support this review window
catalogCompositionRouteMapContentFallbac: A live CMS route is ready when browse needs broader storefront context.
catalogCompositionRouteMapAccountDescrip: Account continuity stays one step away when the shopper wants to move from browse into self-service or account-led follow-up.
catalogCompositionRouteMapAccountCartDes: {itemCount} active cart lines totaling {total} are already available, so browse can rejoin the live purchase flow directly.
offerWindowMessage: {name} currently leads this catalog window with a savings signal of {savingsPercent}%.
offerWindowFallback: No compare-at offer is currently visible in this catalog window, so the route stays focused on base assortment browsing.
buyingGuideLensFiltered: Search or browse lens is active
catalogReadinessMessage: This catalog window is currently operating at a {status} level for browse and offer coverage, based on visible assortment, category context, and CMS follow-up support.
catalogReadinessSupportValue: {categoryCount} category lanes and {cmsCount} CMS follow-up pages visible
catalogFacetImageValue: {withImageCount} products with primary image, {missingImageCount} still missing one
catalogFacetSavingsValue: {valueOfferCount} value offers and {heroOfferCount} hero offers in this browse set
catalogReviewMessage: {offerCount} visible offers and {baseCount} visible base-assortment products are currently available, so this catalog window can move directly into the strongest next review set.
catalogReviewImageCoverageValue: {count} visible products still missing a primary image
catalogReviewOfferCoverageValue: {count} visible products currently fall back to base assortment
catalogReviewTargetImageMessage: This visible product still needs primary-image coverage, so it is the strongest current merchandising-attention target.
catalogReviewTargetOfferMessage: This visible product is already carrying a {savingsPercent}% savings signal and is ready for stronger offer review.
catalogReviewTargetBaseMessage: This visible product currently falls back to the base assortment and should stay visible during assortment review.
catalogReviewTargetsFallback: No visible product currently needs a stronger review target inside this assortment window.
campaignWindowMessage: This catalog surface can already turn {categoryCount} visible category lanes and {productCount} visible products into stronger browse and buying stories.
campaignWindowCategoryTitle: {category} is ready as a stronger browse decision.
campaignWindowCategoryFallbackDescriptio: This visible category lane is ready to carry the shopper into a clearer catalog campaign path.
campaignWindowProductTitle: {product} is ready as a stronger buying decision.
campaignWindowProductDescription: {campaignLabel}: this visible product currently carries a savings signal of {savingsPercent}% at a live price of {price}.
campaignWindowProductFallbackDescription: {campaignLabel}: this visible product is already live at {price} and ready for the next buying move.
campaignWindowPromotionLaneSectionMessag: This catalog surface can now open the strongest merchandising windows directly, not only generic browse stories.
campaignWindowPromotionLaneFallbackTitle: {lane} currently has no visible anchor product.
campaignWindowPromotionLaneDescription: {lane}: {count} visible products currently qualify for this lane. The current lead price is {price}.
campaignWindowPromotionLaneFallbackDescr: {lane} currently has no visible products, so this merchandising lane stays visible as an explicit gap.
campaignWindowEmptyMessage: No stronger browse campaigns are currently derivable from this catalog surface.
catalogCartWindowMessage: {itemCount} live cart lines already exist at {total}, so browse can move directly into the active purchase flow instead of starting over.
catalogCartWindowFallback: No live cart is currently visible, so this browse window stays focused on product and category discovery.
catalogCmsWindowMessage: CMS status: {cmsPagesStatus}. {pageCount} published pages are currently visible so catalog browsing stays connected to live storefront content.
catalogCmsWindowFallbackDescription: Published storefront content available from the catalog route.
catalogCmsWindowEmptyMessage: No published CMS follow-up is currently visible. CMS status: {status}.
visibleToolsDescription: Product search now runs through the public catalog contract. The assortment and priority lenses then refine the current result window.
catalogFacetMissingImageMessage: {count} products still need primary imagery in this matching assortment.
catalogFacetWithImageMessage: {count} products already carry primary imagery in this matching assortment.
catalogFacetValueOfferMessage: {count} products already carry a value-offer savings signal in this matching assortment.
catalogFacetHeroOfferMessage: {count} products currently carry the strongest visible savings signal.
visibleLensActiveMessage: {count} of {loadedCount} products in this result window match the current search or browse lens. {serverTotal} products are available overall for this catalog query.
visibleResultsNote: cards after product search and browse lenses
categoryFallbackDescription: Category detail content is currently limited to the public category summary contract.
noResultsTitle: No published products matched this category yet.
noResultsDescription: The storefront shell stays stable, but catalog content for this slice is empty. This is now observable instead of silently hiding behind placeholders.
productDescriptionFallback: Published product card delivered from the public catalog surface.
paginationMessage: Move across the published catalog result windows while preserving the current category, product search, and browse lens.
productUnavailableMessage: The public product endpoint returned status "{status}". This is now visible in the storefront instead of failing silently.
productDataWarningsMessage: The primary detail fetch reported status "{status}". The page still renders what it could resolve from the current API response.
productRouteSummaryMessage: Product status: {status}. Related-products status: {relatedProductsStatus}. CMS status: {cmsPagesStatus}. {relatedCount} related products are currently visible.
primaryCategoryUnknown: Primary category metadata is not available in the current storefront route context.
mediaCountMessage: {count} published media items are available for this product detail.
noMediaGalleryMessage: No published media gallery was returned, so the storefront is using the explicit no-media fallback.
relatedOfferSnapshotMessage: {name} is the strongest visible category follow-up offer at {savingsPercent}% savings.
relatedOfferSnapshotFallback: No related compare-at offer is currently visible in the adjacent category follow-up.
productReadinessMessage: This product detail is currently operating at a {status} level for buying and discovery continuity, based on metadata, merchandising coverage, and follow-up signals.
productReadinessFollowUpValue: Primary category ready: {primaryCategory}. {relatedCount} related products visible.
productReviewWindowMessage: This product detail now hands assortment review back into the strongest catalog window for its current {status} state, so offer/base review can continue from the right browse set instead of restarting from the default catalog.
productNextReviewTargetImageMessage: The next strongest visible product still needs primary-image coverage, so assortment review can continue immediately from this detail route.
productNextReviewTargetOfferMessage: The next strongest visible product already carries a {savingsPercent}% savings signal and should stay near the top of offer review.
productNextReviewTargetBaseMessage: The next strongest visible product currently sits in the base assortment and is the next clean follow-up for assortment review.
productNextReviewTargetFallback: No other visible product currently needs stronger review follow-up in this assortment window.
productReviewQueueMessage: There are {remainingCount} more related products in the visible review queue.
productReviewQueueOfferMessage: This product is still one of the strongest visible offers at {savingsPercent}% savings.
productReviewQueueBaseMessage: This product now represents the base assortment review path.
productReviewQueueFallback: No more visible product review targets remain in this queue.
productReviewNavigationMessage: This product currently sits at position {current} of {total} inside the active assortment-review window.
productReviewNavigationFallback: This product is not currently part of an active assortment-review navigation window.
productReviewNavigationAdjacentFallback: No additional short description is currently visible for this review target.
productReviewNavigationPreviousEmpty: There is no earlier product inside the current review window.
productReviewNavigationNextEmpty: There is no later product inside the current review window.
noVariantsMessage: No published variant snapshots were returned for this product.
productAddOnsMessage: {groupCount} add-on groups with {optionCount} options and {valueCount} selectable values are available for this product.
productAddOnsEmptyMessage: No published add-ons are currently available for this product.
productAddOnsNoValuesMessage: No selectable values are published for this option yet.
cannotAddToCartTitle: This product cannot be added to cart yet.
cannotAddToCartMessage: No published variant snapshot is currently available for the storefront add-to-cart flow.
productCrossSurfaceMessage: A product detail should not trap the shopper in one leaf route. Keep adjacent storefront paths visible from the same conversion surface.
productCrossSurfaceHomeDescription: Go back to the composed storefront entry surface to review the broader CMS, catalog, and member system state.
productCrossSurfaceCatalogDescription: Move back into the broader catalog window or the active category route without losing the current storefront context.
productCrossSurfaceCmsTitle: Move back into published CMS context
productCrossSurfaceCmsDescription: Carry product discovery back into the public CMS surfaces so content and commerce keep reading like one front-office system.
productCrossSurfaceAccountDescription: Continue from public product discovery into sign-in, self-service, loyalty, orders, and invoice follow-up on the shared shell.
productCompositionJourneyMessage: This product detail can now compose browse, review, and checkout/cart handoff as one explicit route journey instead of leaving buying follow-up spread across separate panels.
productCompositionJourneyBrowseDescripti: This route currently keeps {relatedCount} related products visible inside the same category-led browse lane.
productCompositionJourneyBrowseFallbackD: No primary category is visible right now, so the route falls back to the broader catalog window.
productCompositionJourneyReviewFallbackT: This product is the current review anchor.
productCompositionJourneyReviewDescripti: {reviewCount} products are still visible in the active assortment-review window, so review can continue from this route.
productCompositionJourneyReviewFallbackD: No stronger next review target is visible right now, so this product remains the current review anchor.
productCompositionJourneyCheckoutDescrip: {itemCount} live cart lines already exist at {total}, so this product route can continue directly into the active purchase flow.
productCompositionJourneyCartOfferDescri: This live offer can move directly into cart or checkout at {price}.
productCompositionJourneyCartBaseDescrip: This product is ready to move directly into cart or checkout at {price}.
productCompositionRouteMapMessage: This route can now reopen the strongest browse lane, the media and variant context, and the conversion path as one explicit product-driven action map.
productCompositionRouteMapCatalogFallbac: The broader catalog remains the active browse lane.
productCompositionRouteMapCatalogDescrip: {relatedCount} related products are currently visible from this route.
productCompositionRouteMapCatalogFallbac: No primary category is visible right now, so this route falls back to the broader catalog surface.
productCompositionRouteMapMediaTitle: {count} media items are visible on this route.
productCompositionRouteMapMediaDescripti: This product currently carries {variantCount} visible variants through the public catalog contract.
productCompositionRouteMapOfferDescripti: The visible offer is currently live at {price} and ready for cart or checkout handoff.
productCompositionRouteMapOfferFallbackD: This product is currently live at {price} and ready for cart or checkout handoff.
productCmsWindowMessage: CMS status: {cmsPagesStatus}. {pageCount} published pages are currently visible so this product route can hand off into live storefront content, not only adjacent catalog routes.
productCmsWindowFallbackDescription: Published storefront content available for follow-up from this product route.
productCmsWindowEmptyMessage: No published CMS follow-up is currently visible from this product route. CMS status: {status}.
relatedProductsDescription: These recommendations stay inside the current public catalog contract by reusing the selected product's primary category.
relatedProductsDegradedMessage: The category-follow-up fetch returned status "{status}". Product detail stays available, but adjacent catalog discovery needs attention.
relatedProductsEmptyMessage: No additional published products are currently visible for this category.
productOfferWindowMessage: This product is currently published with a savings signal of {savingsPercent}%, so the storefront can present it as an active offer instead of only a static detail page.
productOfferWindowFallback: This product currently has no compare-at offer signal, so the storefront is presenting it as a base assortment detail route.
productCatalogWindowTitle: Browse lanes next to this product
productCatalogWindowMessage: Category status: {categoriesStatus}. {categoryCount} browse lanes are currently visible so this product route can hand off into live catalog context, not only adjacent product cards.
productCatalogWindowFallbackDescription: Live catalog follow-up available from this product route.
productCatalogWindowEmptyMessage: No catalog browse lanes are currently visible from this product route. Category status: {status}.
productProductsWindowMessage: Product status: {productsStatus}. {productCount} storefront products are currently visible so this route can reopen concrete follow-up offers instead of stopping at one detail page.
productProductsWindowOfferDescription: Current savings signal: {savingsPercent}% against the visible compare-at price. Current storefront price: {price}.
productProductsWindowFallbackDescription: Published storefront product available for follow-up from this detail route.
productProductsWindowEmptyMessage: No storefront product follow-up is currently visible from this route. Product status: {status}.
productCartWindowMessage: A live cart already holds {itemCount} lines at {total}, so this product route can move the shopper straight back into the active purchase path.
productCartWindowFallback: No live cart is currently visible, so this product route stays focused on product evaluation and adjacent storefront follow-up.
catalogProductsWindowTitle: Live product follow-up from this browse window
catalogProductsWindowMessage: Product status: {productsStatus}. {productCount} visible storefront products are currently available so this catalog route can reopen concrete offers, not only static browse lanes.
catalogProductsWindowOfferDescription: Current savings signal: {savingsPercent}% against the visible compare-at price. Current storefront price: {price}.
catalogProductsWindowFallbackDescription: Published storefront product available from this catalog browse window.
catalogProductsWindowEmptyMessage: No storefront product follow-up is currently visible from this browse window. Product status: {status}.
